prose: The frontier orbitals task on formaldehyde was performed using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The calculation used charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The results show a HOMO energy of -7.6523067 eV and a LUMO energy of -1.7826355 eV, with a HOMO-LUMO gap of approximately 5.86967 eV. The calculation converged in 8 SCF cycles. The method used was PySCF.
